name: Data Center Physical Infrastructure
description: Power/UPS, cooling/CRAC, and environmental monitoring — battery health, thermal management, and physical security.
quickTip: Integrate DCIM or BMS platforms via SNMP or API to collect environmental and power data.

subcategories.name: Power & UPS
subcategories.primaryAppTa: SNMP TA (UPS-MIB, PDU-MIB), vendor APIs (APC, Eaton, Vertiv).

subcategories.name: Cooling & Environmental
subcategories.primaryAppTa: SNMP, BMS integration, environmental sensor inputs.

subcategories.name: Physical Security
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Access control system integration, camera system syslog/API.
